div.p: Production-grade message broker in Go Implements pub/sub fan-out and consumer-group competitive consumption over TCP with persistent append-only log storage, backpressure, and DLQ support.

g.text: M1 | message-queue-m1 | Wire Protocol & Pub/Sub Fan-out
M2 | message-queue-m2 | Consumer Groups, ACK/NACK & Poison Detection
M3 | message-queue-m3 | Persistence, Crash Recovery & Backpressure
M4 | message-queue-m4 | Dead Letter Queue & Monitoring API

ul.li: sql_table = Data structures with fields and types
All struct/class labels include file path (e.g., "server.go")

g.text: fsync every N or M ms
MoveToDLQ(topic, offset, payload, retries, reason, consumerID)

ol.li: Discover all *.log files in data directory

For each topic log:
Read all entries (skip corrupted with CRC warning)
Find min committed offset across groups
Re-queue messages where offset > minCommittedOffset
